source.title: Structural Damage - Crane Other Lifting - Gas Release Incident at VK-915A

context.operator: Occidental Petroleum (owned by Anadarko Petroleum Corporation)

actions_taken: Gas alarm detected by Compressor #1 monitoring system
Control Room Operator immediately traveled to Compressor #1 location
Emergency Shutdown System (ESD) activated to shut in compressor and platform
Platform muster performed to account for all personnel
Pressure bled down from affected equipment
Broken 3/4 inch pipe nipple removed and replaced
Facility returned to production after 30 minutes
event.summary: On 24 November 2024 at 1710 hours, a 3/4 inch pipe nipple on the sight glass level bridle of Compressor #1 Suction Scrubber (MBF P630A-1) cracked and broke, releasing gas from the platform. The gas alarm activated, alerting the Control Room Operator who witnessed the release and initiated platform shutdown via the Emergency Shutdown System. A platform muster was conducted with no injuries reported. The broken nipple was replaced and the facility returned to production within 30 minutes. The incident was caused by fatigue cracking of the nipple due to extended compressor vibrations, over-tightening during original installation, possible loosening causing excessive vibration, and excessive weight from the sight glass level bridle support.
recommendations: BSEE recommends issuing a Safety Alert regarding the incident
Anadarko to submit Management of Change (MOC) to install additional support to Compressor #1 Suction Scrubber sight glass level bridle to reduce weight and vibration on the nipple

threats.name: Pipe Nipple Fatigue Cracking and Failure
Excessive Weight and Vibration on Pipe Nipple
Over-tightening of Pipe Nipple During Installation

controls.name: Gas Detection System
controls.barrier_role: Detection of gas release to alert personnel
controls.lod_basis: Detects gas release and triggers alarm response

supporting_text: the VK-915A platform control room received a gas alarm on the Compressor #1

An Occidental Petroleum Control Room Operator (CRO) immediately traveled to the Compressor #1 and witnessed the nipple on the sight glass level bridle for the number one suction scrubber releasing gas
The gas detectors detected the gas release and alarmed personnel who were then able to shut in the platform

controls.name: Emergency Shutdown System (ESD)
controls.barrier_role: Automatic shutdown of compressor and platform to isolate hazard
controls.lod_basis: Automatically shuts in platform in response to gas alarm

supporting_text: The compressor #1 and the platform were then shut in by the Emergency Shutdown System (ESD)
The facility safety systems functioned as designed

controls.name: Control Room Operator Response and Isolation
controls.barrier_role: Manual intervention to isolate affected equipment and bleed down pressure
controls.lod_basis: Operator response to alarm and manual isolation of equipment

supporting_text: An Occidental Petroleum Control Room Operator (CRO) immediately traveled to the Compressor #1 and witnessed the nipple on the sight glass level bridle for the number one suction scrubber releasing gas
After seeing the gas release, the CRO called the control room
The compressor and number one scrubber were then isolated, and the pressure was bled down

controls.name: Platform Muster Procedure
controls.barrier_role: Account for all personnel and ensure safe evacuation if needed

supporting_text: Due to the gas alarm sounding, there was a platform muster performed to account for all personnel

controls.name: Pipe Nipple Installation and Maintenance Procedures
controls.barrier_role: Prevent over-tightening and improper installation of pipe nipples
controls.lod_basis: Proper installation procedures should prevent fatigue cracking

supporting_text: the over-tightening of the nipple when it was originally installed over four years ago

controls.name: Mechanical Integrity Program and Equipment Support Design
controls.barrier_role: Ensure adequate structural support for sight glass level bridle to prevent excessive weight and vibration on pipe nipple
controls.lod_basis: Proper design and support should prevent fatigue cracking from vibration and weight

supporting_text: the possibility of too much weight on the nipple from supporting the sight glass level bridle
Flawed equipment design – The insufficient support for the sight glass level bridle causing excessive weight on 3/4 inch nipple

controls.name: Vibration Monitoring and Equipment Condition Assessment
controls.barrier_role: Detect and monitor compressor vibration to prevent fatigue cracking of connected components
controls.lod_basis: Early detection of excessive vibration could prevent nipple fatigue failure

supporting_text: the vibrations caused by the compressor #1 unit over an extended period of time
the possibility of the nipple slightly loosening and causing excessive vibration of the nipple

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
